manageCivilCentersDescShort: Centers that receive and process declarations.
settingsDesc: Configure registration deadlines, notifications, and platform display options.
auditLogsDesc: Track sign-ins, data changes, and administrative actions across the platform.
reportsDesc: Analytics, hospital performance, and notification delivery history.
manageHospitalsDesc: Register and maintain hospitals that submit birth declarations.
manageCivilCentersDesc: Register civil status offices that receive and process declarations.
manageUsersDesc: Assign roles and link users to hospitals or civil status centers.
noReportData: No data available for this report yet.
settings.categoriesDesc.registration: Legal deadlines and reminder schedules for birth registration.
settings.categoriesDesc.notifications: SMS/email delivery limits and provider configuration.
settings.categoriesDesc.platform: Branding and display names shown across the application.
settings.registrationDeadlineDesc: Legal deadline for birth registration, in days.
settings.reminderDaysDesc: Number of days before the deadline to send a reminder.
settings.reminderIntervalDesc: Days between automatic SMS/email reminders until registration is complete.
settings.notificationRetryDesc: Maximum number of notification delivery attempts.
settings.smsProviderDesc: Active SMS provider for sending messages.
settings.platformNameDesc: Platform name displayed across the application.
settings.sensitiveNote: This setting is managed by the system and cannot be edited here.
settings.smsProviderHelp.mock: SMS messages are logged to the server console. No real messages are sent. Ideal for testing.
settings.smsProviderHelp.africas_talking: Sends real SMS via Africa's Talking. Configure API credentials in Supabase secrets (AFRICAS_TALKING_API_KEY, AFRICAS_TALKING_USERNAME).
settings.smsProviderHelp.twilio: Sends real SMS via Twilio. Configure TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, and TWILIO_FROM in Supabase secrets.
exportMenuHint: Choose scope, then pick a format
